title: Who killed Asukas parents
wikitext:
[]: Who killed Asuka's parents?             Quote Post by Crazyman42 » Thu Jun 24, 2004 8:49 pm Who did kill Asuka's parents? Is it something I missed in the series, or is it just not known?

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Thu Jun 24, 2004 8:53 pm the dad left them i believe and her mom killed herself try to remember that chick that was haning from the ceiling on a rope. that meant she was dead ^_~ to add to the already immense trauma of seeing this site. Asuka's mom, which escapes me right now, also hung the little doll that she thought was Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by Crazyman42 » Thu Jun 24, 2004 8:58 pm I remember the hanging part with the doll, that was emotional as hell, but I though someone actually put her there.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 24, 2004 9:18 pm In the anime, her father was "gone", either separated, estranged, or simply elsewhere. Her mother on the other hand went insane from the first contact experiment, and eventually committed suicide. In the manga she was a test tube child (or so she claimed). The manga is up to the point where her back story is fleshed out, but I'm not that familiar with it as its only fan translated, but it appears to be about the same deal as in the anime. In the end, neither of her parents were "killed".

[]:             Quote Post by dennisud » Fri Jun 25, 2004 12:16 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: In the anime, her father was "gone", either separated, estranged, or simply elsewhere. Her mother on the other hand went insane from the first contact experiment, and eventually committed suicide. In the manga she was a test tube child (or so she claimed). The manga is up to the point where her back story is fleshed out, but I'm not that familiar with it as its only fan translated, but it appears to be about the same deal as in the anime. In the end, neither of her parents were "killed".

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 26, 2004 12:31 pm I find it amusing that Sadamoto took the German superiority motif that Asuka has in the anime and abstracted it to an extreme. The dialog between Asuka and Shinji is pretty funny. She just keeps going on and on about sperm and eggs like its rocket science. Poor Shinji. Poor, poor Shinji....

[]:             Quote Post by alan » Fri Jul 23, 2004 2:42 pm I thought the sperm from Asuka's genius dad was given to Asuka's mom sperm bank style.. but wasnt Asuka given to her father and stepmother after her real mom hung herself? idk.. pretty confusing.

[]:             Quote Post by dennisud » Fri Jul 23, 2004 8:18 pm You know what? Kaworu was "Concieved in Germany By SEELE right? Maybe they had a ready made set of Eggs just waiting to be used! They probably had the run of Nerv/Geherin Germany right! Well, wouldn't it a be a real kick in the butt if Kaworu was related to Asuka in the same vein as Rei is to Shinji?????? :o dennisud

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Jul 24, 2004 5:50 am i do recall Asuka saying something like that in the manga...but related to everyone? i doubt it... at least some genetic characteristics should be in common (hair, eye color)

[]: Re: Who killed Asuka's parents?             Quote Post by child-of-lillith » Wed Jul 28, 2004 12:46 pm Crazyman42 wrote: Who did kill Asuka's parents? Is it something I missed in the series, or is it just not known?

[]:             Quote Post by child-of-lillith » Wed Jul 28, 2004 12:48 pm dennisud wrote: You know what? Kaworu was "Concieved in Germany By SEELE right? Maybe they had a ready made set of Eggs just waiting to be used! They probably had the run of Nerv/Geherin Germany right! Well, wouldn't it a be a real kick in the butt if Kaworu was related to Asuka in the same vein as Rei is to Shinji?????? :o dennisud

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Jul 28, 2004 1:23 pm child-of-lillith wrote: the rumour i heard is Kwarou has a bit of one of the Akagis in him, either Ritsuko or her mother

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Wed Jul 28, 2004 1:57 pm dennisud wrote: You know what? Kaworu was "Concieved in Germany By SEELE right? Maybe they had a ready made set of Eggs just waiting to be used! They probably had the run of Nerv/Geherin Germany right! Well, wouldn't it a be a real kick in the butt if Kaworu was related to Asuka in the same vein as Rei is to Shinji?????? :o dennisud

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Aug 04, 2004 10:27 am wonderboy? lol...although she was in a coma at the time so i dont think she noticed... poor Asuka.. but her dad we never find out about... was the doll also hung when kyoto killed herself?

[]:             Quote Post by lifevirusforte » Wed Aug 04, 2004 11:17 am sadsadshinji wrote: wonderboy? lol...although she was in a coma at the time so i dont think she noticed... poor Asuka.. but her dad we never find out about... was the doll also hung when kyoto killed herself?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sun Aug 08, 2004 12:30 pm what was with the blood? a representation?

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Aug 08, 2004 5:46 pm I thought that Asuka dad worked for UN , or the europe Nerv
